#!/usr/bin/env python3
import csv, sys

csv_path = r'C:\Temp\fb2parser\regen.csv'

print("=== CSV rows with 'егион' ===")
with open(csv_path, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    reader = csv.reader(f)
    header = next(reader)
    print(','.join(header))
    for row in reader:
        if any('егион' in cell for cell in row):
            print(','.join(row))

print()
print("=== PASS 2 DEBUG from regen log (if logger writes to file) ===")
# Also run regen and capture only DEBUG lines for Legion files
